It's an effective, widely-used oral antibiotic suitable for treating CAP in outpatients due to its broad spectrum activity including coverage against many common causative agents and its convenient once-daily dosing regimen which enhances patient compliance. Additionally, it has been shown to have fewer side effects compared to some other options making it more favorable for use outside hospitals.

**Final Answer:** C - Azithromycin remains the best
